_doc: Wave-4 Anthropic-style contextual retrieval: LLM (gemma-4) writes a 1-2 sentence situating context per chunk, prepended to the deterministic header + verbatim chunk in the embedding/sparse field. apply_to ALL chunks (md+code). raw_text stays verbatim. Builds on the Wave-2 header win (current best). Re-indexes; needs the gemma-4 context cache (wave4_context.py generate).
